name: White Chocolate Party Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Slowly melt white chocolate in the top of a double boiler over simmering water.
2. Combine cereals, pretzels, peanuts, and candy in a large bowl.
3. Slowly pour the melted chocolate over the mixture and stir until evenly coated.
4. Spread the mixture on wax paper and allow to cool.
5. Break into small pieces.
6. Store in an airtight container and refrigerate to keep fresh.
